available_batch_fields_for_real_target.candidate_valid_mask: not part of Stage2SemanticDataset training batch; external manifest only
available_batch_fields_for_real_target.fut_valid: available [B,H,K], entity-slot aligned future visibility/presence mask
available_batch_fields_for_real_target.gt_candidate_id: not available in Stage2SemanticDataset validation split
available_batch_fields_for_real_target.obs_valid: available [B,Obs,K], observed visibility/presence mask used for reappearance gate
available_batch_fields_for_real_target.observed_future_instance_id: semantic_entity_dominant_instance_id and point_ids available, but not needed for minimum slot-aligned fut_valid target
available_batch_fields_for_real_target.semantic_instance_valid: available [B,K,T] but temporal window may be shorter than obs+future and is dataset-instance-source dependent
available_batch_fields_for_real_target.trace_valid_mask: tf_out valid_mask available as fut_valid & token_mask

current_target_visibility_construction.eval_before_v1: visibility_accuracy used item-level future_visibility_prob_mean vs sample-level target_visibility.
current_target_visibility_construction.export_before_v1: target_visibility=1 if valid_mask.any() else None, i.e. sample-level simplified target.
current_target_visibility_construction.training_before_v1: visibility_target=(batch["fut_valid"] & batch["token_mask"][:, None, :]) passed to compute_future_semantic_state_losses, but BCE was masked by tf_out["valid_mask"], so negative future-invisible entries were not supervised.

minimum_viable_target_definition: future_visibility_target=fut_valid[B,H,K]; future_visibility_mask=token_mask broadcast to [B,H,K]; future_reappearance_target=fut_valid & ((not visible at observed endpoint) or observed-window occlusion) for each slot; target_source=fut_valid_slot_aligned; target_quality=strong_slot_aligned.
most_reliable_visibility_reappearance_ta: fut_valid_slot_aligned with obs_valid endpoint/occlusion gate for reappearance
training_loss_change: future_visibility_loss now uses target builder visibility target and mask; future_reappearance_loss added with default weight 0.0.
why_visibility_accuracy_1p0_not_calibrat: The previous exported target was sample-level and almost always positive when any future entity existed; it did not test per-horizon invisibility, reappearance, or calibrated negative entries.
